full_prompt:
Design an aluminum payload adapter ring that mechanically interfaces a 500 kg satellite to a Delta-IV-class upper stage, governed by SMC-S-016 (5 September 2014). SMC-S-016 Section 6.1 specifies qualification random vibration 3 dB above the Maximum Expected Environment (MEE) for 2 minutes per axis, Section 6.2 prescribes thermal qualification at MEP (Maximum Expected Pressure/Temperature) + 10 C, and Section 6.6 prescribes static test factors 1.25 (yield) / 1.4 (ultimate) on limit loads for qualification hardware, consistent with NASA-STD-5001B.

Geometry. Adapter ring outer diameter 1575 mm (62 inches, standard payload interface), inner diameter 1475 mm, height 200 mm. Top interface: clamp-band-compatible V-band groove per 937 mm (or designer-equivalent bolted ring); this brief uses a 24-bolt pattern with 24 M10 fasteners on a 1500 mm bolt circle. Bottom interface: 48 M10 fasteners on a 1525 mm bolt circle attaching to the upper stage. Ring wall thickness design variable 4-10 mm. Integral stiffening flanges at top and bottom (25 mm tall x wall thickness). Material to be Al 7075-T73 forging per MMPDS.

Material. Al 7075-T7351 per MMPDS S-basis: E = 71.7 GPa, nu = 0.33, rho = 2810 kg/m^3, Fty = 414 MPa, Ftu = 476 MPa.

MEE (Maximum Expected Environment). Axial limit load from CLA (coupled loads analysis): 7.5 g x 500 kg = 36,787 N distributed over 24 top bolts (nominal tension per bolt = 1533 N at limit). Lateral limit load: 3 g x 500 kg = 14,715 N at payload CG (located 1.5 m above adapter top). Combined axial + lateral produces moment at adapter top = 14,715 * 1.5 = 22,073 N*m. Random-vibration MEE PSD plateau 0.04 g^2/Hz from 50 Hz to 1500 Hz, 3 dB qualification uplift => qualification plateau 0.08 g^2/Hz. Sine qualification 3 g from 5 Hz to 50 Hz. Thermal: MEP temperatures -60 C to +85 C, qualification adds +10 C => -60 C to +95 C.

Load cases. LC1 (static qualification limit): axial 7.5 g + lateral 3 g applied simultaneously at payload CG. Ultimate = 1.4 x limit. LC2 (random vib qualification, 3 dB above MEE): PSD plateau 0.08 g^2/Hz from 50-1500 Hz applied at upper-stage interface, each axis, 2 min/axis. LC3 (thermal qualification): bulk DeltaT scan between -60 C and +95 C applied to the fully constrained ring; compute thermal-stress state at the two extremes. LC4 (buckling - axial compression): pure axial 1.4 x 7.5 g x 500 kg = 51,502 N compression; linear buckling eigenvalue analysis.

Pass/fail criteria. (R1) LC1 at 1.25 x limit max von Mises must not exceed Fty = 414 MPa, i.e. stress at limit <= Fty / 1.25 = 331.2 MPa per SMC-S-016 qualification yield factor (consistent with NASA-STD-5001B). (R2) LC1 at 1.4 x limit max von Mises must not exceed Ftu = 476 MPa, i.e. stress at limit <= Ftu / 1.4 = 340.0 MPa. (R3) LC2 qualification random 3-sigma response stress must not exceed Ftu / 1.4 = 340.0 MPa. (R4) LC3 max thermal-induced von Mises must not exceed Fty = 414 MPa (unfactored thermal check). (R5) LC4 linear buckling eigenvalue must be >= 1.4 (ultimate FoS on stability). (R6) First natural frequency of the adapter with 500 kg payload lumped at 1.5 m above top must be >= 25 Hz (launch-vehicle decoupling; common launch-provider gate). (R7) Adapter mass <= 35 kg.

Solver and analysis expectations. Primary analyses: (a) linear static for LC1 (R1, R2); (b) PSD random response via modal superposition for LC2 (R3); (c) linear thermal-stress (bulk DeltaT) for LC3 (R4); (d) linear buckling eigenvalue for LC4 (R5); (e) constrained modal for R6. Axisymmetric or 3D shell+solid model acceptable; 5 mm mesh at bolt-hole ligaments. Fluid, radiation analyses NOT required.

Deliverables. STEP AP242 of adapter, mass in kg, max von Mises per LC, random 3-sigma stress, thermal-stress at extremes, buckling eigenvalue, and first 10 modes.
short_prompt:
Design a 500 kg satellite-to-Delta-IV-class payload adapter ring (Al 7075-T7351 forging) per SMC-S-016 (2014-09-05). SMC-S-016 specifies qualification at 1.25 yield / 1.4 ultimate factors on limit loads (consistent with NASA-STD-5001B), random vibration 3 dB above the MEE for 2 min/axis, and thermal qualification at MEP + 10 C.

Envelope: OD 1575 mm, ID 1475 mm, height 200 mm. 24 M10 fasteners on a 1500 mm top bolt circle, 48 M10 on a 1525 mm bottom bolt circle, wall thickness design variable 4-10 mm with integral top/bottom stiffening flanges.

Load cases. The 500 kg payload CG is 1.5 m above the adapter top.
- LC1 static qualification limit: 7.5 g axial + 3 g lateral applied simultaneously.
- LC2 random vibration qualification: PSD plateau 0.08 g^2/Hz from 50-1500 Hz (3 dB above MEE 0.04), 2 min/axis.
- LC3 thermal qualification: bulk DeltaT between -60 C and +95 C (MEP +/- 10 C).
- LC4 axial buckling: pure 1.4 x 7.5 g x 500 kg = 51,502 N compression (linear eigenvalue).

prompt.title: 1575 mm payload adapter ring per SMC-S-016 qualification
prompt.brief: Al 7075-T7351 adapter ring, 500 kg payload, SMC-S-016 qualification factors 1.25/1.4 + 3 dB random + MEP+10 C thermal + buckling 1.4; fn >= 25 Hz.

boundary_conditions.top_bolt_circle: payload interface with 500 kg lumped at 1.5 m

exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis_not_excluded: Note: buckling IS required (LC4); only fluid/radiation excluded.

eval_coverage: thermal + random + static + buckling in one brief
